name: Cordova Recreation Sports Center
description: Cordova Recreation Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Lafayette, IN. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Faith East Community Center
description: Faith East Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Legacy Courts
description: Legacy Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights.
fees: Fee required — $3 per person  - Cash or Credit

name: McAllister Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at McAllister Recreation Center in Lafayette, IN! There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: McCaw Park
description: McCaw Park is a place to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Northend Community Center
description: Northend Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Riverside Skating Center
description: Riverside Skating Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Lafayette, IN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: The Academy Boiler Juniors
description: Come play pickleball at The Academy Boiler Juniors in Lafayette, IN! There are 3 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: West Lafayette Wellness Center
description: West Lafayette Wellness Center is a place to play pickleball in West Lafayette, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water.

name: YMCA of Lafayette Indiana
description: YMCA of Lafayette Indiana is a place to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — $10 day rate, or you can visit up to 3 times free in one year.

name: YWCA Greater Lafayette
description: YWCA Greater Lafayette is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lafayette, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $5 per session – You must sign up to play using the YWCA Sign Up Genius
